scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sarge/core build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @sarge/pixel build && pnpm --filter @sarge/api build && pnpm --filter @sarge/worker build && pnpm --dir www build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @sarge/core build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @sarge/pixel build && node scripts/embed-pixel.mjs && vitest run && pnpm --dir www test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sarge/core build && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @sarge/pixel build && node scripts/embed-pixel.mjs && pnpm -r typecheck
